title: Mysterious Lands
description: Made during SpookyJam 2017, Mysterious Lands (Formerly Spooky Biomes) is a bundle of some spooky feeling and miscellaneous nice to have biomes to enhance your gameplay!
body: # Mysterious Lands [![Discord Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-16181C?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=5865F2)](https://discord.tophatcat.dev) [![CurseForge Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-16181C?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=FF784D)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mysterious-lands) [![Modrinth Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-16181C?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=17B85A)](https://modrinth.com/mod/mysterious-lands) [![Bluesky Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Bluesky-16181C?style=for-the-badge&logo=bluesky&logoColor=1185FE)](https://bsky.app/profile/tophatcat.dev) [![Github Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-16181C?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=BBDDE5)](https://github.com/kiris-mods/mysterious-lands) [![Website Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/tophatcat.dev-16181C?style=for-the-badge&logo=&logoColor=57Z29S)](https://tophatcat.dev/mods/mysterious-lands) Made during SpookyJam 2017, Mysterious Lands (Formerly Spooky Biomes) is a bundle of spooky feeling and mysterious biomes to explore and expand on Vanilla Minecraft! ## [Ghostly Forest](#ghostly-forest) The Ghostly Forest, with it's haunted feeling, creepy ghosts and dense white fog, is not a place one should venture ill prepared... If you carelessly wander into these forests you'll be in for a rather nasty surprise that may lead to your grave... ## [Bloodied Plains](#bloodied-plains) It's said that long ago a raging battle once took place here, between two great mage kingdoms, for many moons these two kingdoms fought until they had all but annihilated one another, leaving nothing but fields of corpses and blood in their wake, although the battle has long since past, it's said that the fields here are still soaked with the blood of the two kingdoms to this day. Rumour has it that wandering forgotten warlocks and knights can be seen lurking in the mist even now, still trying to win the battle for their once proud kingdoms... ## [Sorbus Highland](#sorbus-highland) ## [Seeping Forest](#seeping-forest)
